items.title: JPMorgan Chase Is About to Take Over the Apple Card Business From Goldman Sachs. Here's What Investors Need to Know.
items.description: The largest bank in the U.S. is going to work with what is arguably the world's strongest consumer brand.

items.title: A Look At Goldman Sachs (GS) Valuation After Strong Multi‑Period Share Price Gains
items.description: Event-driven snapshot of Goldman Sachs Group (GS) Goldman Sachs Group (GS) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 1.4% decline over the past day but gains across longer time frames. For investors tracking performance, Goldman Sachs has returns of 2.5% over the past week, 7.7% over the past month, and 26% over the past 3 months, alongside a 56.8% total return over the past year. See our latest analysis for Goldman Sachs Group. That recent 1-day share price...

items.title: Retirement plan sponsors slow-walk private asset adoption, new report finds
items.description: According to a new report from consulting firm Cerulli Associates, a small number of employer-provided retirement plans are rolling out offerings with private asset options this year. But it will be roughly a decade before even 20% do so.

items.title: 'A broadening playbook': Wall Street sees stock market gains beyond tech
items.description: Enthusiasm for artificial intelligence's prospects will continue to drive the market higher in 2026. The gains won't be limited to tech stocks, strategists say.

items.title: Steve Jobs' 1976 Memorabilia Fetches Big Bucks, Apple's Reliance On Google And More: This Week In Appleverse
items.description: From rare Steve Jobs memorabilia to fresh debate over Apple's AI strategy, these were some of the biggest Apple stories of the week.
